rationale: The proposed change concerns the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount. Fam. Code §65.103 governs truancy court remedial orders and has no relation to property tax exemptions.
quote: Sec. 65.103. REMEDIAL ORDER. (a) A truancy court may enter a remedial order requiring a child who has been found to have engaged in truant conduct to:
_note: No conflict: the cited rule (truancy remedial orders) is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase.
